raw_consumer_statement: This is my second complaint about the XXXX dollars on my cc statement it was supposed to only be XXXX but I got ripped off I am looking to get reimbursed the XXXX not the XXXX I have been explaining this with 3 different letters now on what happened in XXXX they wrote a letter telling me they can't help me and today I received a letter that they will credit this card XXXX omg what's so hard to understand? It was supposed to be XXXX but vendor changed that amount to XXXX it's fraudelent and a rip off but cc company doesn't get it!
